---
title: "Gödel completeness"
---

This project develops a full proof of the Gödel completeness theorem for
first-order logic, from the note in `completeness.md` to the finished argument in
`workspace/main-proof.qmd`.

The book landing page carries no mathematics of its own. The protected main goal
is stated in the next chapter; the chapters after it develop the syntax, the
semantics, and the Henkin construction the proof rests on, and the last chapter
records the state of the development.
